title: Use GPS for Directions
summary: Use a map app on your phone to get turn-by-turn directions to a place you want to go.
learnerPromise: Use a map app to get turn-by-turn directions.
whyItMatters: GPS directions make it easier to travel to new places with confidence. Whether you are walking, driving, or taking transit, knowing how to use a map app helps you arrive on time and less stressed.
realLifeUses: Getting directions to a friend's house
Finding the fastest route to a store or restaurant
Checking transit options for a trip across town
Sharing your location with someone so they can find you
youWillLearn: How to open a map app and search for a destination
How to choose between walking, driving, and transit directions
How to share your location or send directions to someone
miniChallenge: Use a map app to plan a route to a place you go to often.
steps: Open a map app on your phone or device.
Tap the search bar and type the name or address of a place you go to often.
Select the place from the search results.
Tap the directions button and choose your travel mode: walking, driving, or transit.
Review the suggested route and estimated time, then start the navigation to hear or see turn-by-turn directions.
completionCriteria: You searched for and found a destination in the map app
You selected a travel mode and reviewed the route
commonProblems: The app cannot find your location — make sure location services are turned on
The route looks wrong — check that you selected the correct destination
You lose signal during navigation — the app usually continues with downloaded directions
tips: Download offline maps for areas you visit often in case you lose signal
Check the estimated arrival time before leaving so you can plan ahead
You can share your live location with a trusted person so they know when you will arrive
